name: Highlands Ranch Farmers' Market

Months Open.value: May, June, July, August, September, October, November

Address.value: 9288 Dorchester St, Highlands Ranch, CO (Highlands Ranch Town Center)

notes: The old on-file URL https://www.denverfarmersmarket.com/index.html (with www) returns a 404; the correct live official site is https://denverfarmersmarket.com/ (no www), operated as 'Metro Denver Farmers Market' by the Denver Farmers Market group, which runs the Highlands Ranch Town Center market (Sun, 10am-2pm or sellout, May 3-Nov 1) plus other metro locations (Sterling Ranch, Southwest Plaza, Lakewood). Facebook handle on file matches. Site lists a general marketing email (1977MDFM@gmail.com) and market manager email (dfmmgrrich@comcast.net, not location-specific, omitted). No phone number, SNAP/EBT, ADA accessibility, or certified organic info was found on the site; HRCA event page (hrcaonline.org) returned 403 Forbidden and could not be checked as a secondary source.
